---
title: "BIOL 490 Field Ornithology"
edition: |
   Summer 2026 \
   MSUM
hero-image: 
  path: "birding.jpg"
  caption: "Experiential Learning"
publication-info: |
  \ 
  MSUM Department of Biosciences. \
  For more info: <mailto:chris.merkord@mnstate.edu>
format:
  dept-news-typst:
    page-numbering: false
---

# Learn Birds This Summer

Spend three weeks learning birds through daily field-based activities focused on identification and survey methods.

Students will practice bird ID, surveys, field notebooks, eBird, GPS/ArcGIS, and wildlife data collection. No prior experience is required. Field equipment is provided.

Excellent preparation for undergraduate research, summer internships, and wildlife field jobs.

Counts toward restricted elective requirements for Biology majors and upper-level requirements for all majors.

Register now to help ensure the course runs.

[Course details and registration info](https://chrismerkord.github.io/biol-490/recruitment.html)

::: {.article}
## Why enroll now?

- Almost entirely field-based
- Learn birds of Minnesota and North Dakota
- Gain resume-building field experience
- Great way to spend three weeks outdoors
- Open to students with no prior experience
:::
